page: Microsoft Azure M48bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 server family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The server features 48 virtual CPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The hardware configuration also includes 410 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for block storage performance. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance across several compute and memory-intensive tasks. The server achieves top-tier results in Geekbench image and text processing, placing in the top 10% of tested systems. It also demonstrates strong performance in Geekbench multi-core, software compilation, ray tracing, and Passmark CPU tests, which fall into the top 25%. Memory bandwidth is a notable strength, with both small-block cached and large-block uncached read and write operations scoring in the top 25%. For database operations, the Passmark database benchmark shows strong performance, while Redis SET operations perform at an average level.

The M48bds_v3 is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database management, and data processing tasks. Its high memory capacity and strong memory bandwidth support large in-memory databases and complex analytical queries. The inclusion of Intel Advanced Vector Extensions and Advanced Matrix Extensions supports accelerated mathematical and machine learning operations, as evidenced by strong text generation speeds on medium-sized language models. However, single-core and multi-core stress-ng performance remains in the average tier, indicating that workloads requiring raw, sustained compute-only processing may experience standard performance relative to the high memory allocation.
description: Microsoft Azure M48bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a dedicated 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon 8473C processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, it features 48 vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and 410 GB of local storage. The server delivers strong memory bandwidth and top-tier performance in text and image processing, placing in the top 10% of benchmarks. It also shows strong results in software compilation, database operations, and medium-model LLM text generation. While single-core and multi-core raw compute benchmarks perform at an average level, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core and Premium Storage capability make this instance highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads, in-memory databases, and data-heavy enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M48bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 410 GB local storage, delivering strong memory bandwidth and top-tier text and image processing performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M48bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 410 GB local storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring high-bandwidth RAM, dedicated Intel Xeon processing, and local storage for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores.
384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.
410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage block performance capabilities.
Top-tier benchmark performance in text and image processing.
Strong memory bandwidth and database operation capabilities.
Optimized for in-memory databases, software compilation, and data-heavy workloads.
